text:
There once was an old man named Gus who lived in a cottage on the edge of a dense forest. Every morning he would sit beside his window, peering out into the unknown woods.

One rainy afternoon, while scratching his stubbly chin, Gus noticed something glinting off the trees. Curious, he stepped outside.

There stood a peculiar object, round and shiny—a floating lantern. Confused but intrigued, Gus carefully picked it up. He turned it over in his fingers. It had a soft glow and was filled with an unusual liquid.

Gus shook the lantern. A soft, musical note filled the air. He tried moving his fingers through the liquid. It sparkled like stars. A voice hummed softly, "Greetings, wise one."

Eager to try it out, Gus pointed it towards his cottage. Nothing happened. He tried again. Same result.

Aha! he thought. Maybe it needs music to function. He hummed a little tune—a traditional swamp
